name: Dave Attell
bio: Dave Attell is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer best known for hosting Comedy Centrals late-night travel-and-nightlife series Insomniac with Dave Attell. Known for rapid-fire, dark, observational one-liners delivered in a gravelly deadpan, he emerged from the New York club scene in the late 1980s and wrote for Saturday Night Live. He is widely regarded by other comedians as one of the sharpest joke writers of his generation.

timeline.ev: Graduates NYU, begins performing at open mics
First Late Show with David Letterman appearance; recruited to write for SNL
Insomniac with Dave Attell premieres on Comedy Central
Releases first album, Skanks for the Memories
Comedy Central special Road Work airs
Netflix special Hot Cross Buns released

accolades: Host of Insomniac with Dave Attell (2001-2004)
Widely cited as a comedians comedian for joke-writing
